news.t: Cyber Monday Sales Fall For The First Time Ever—Pulling In $10.7 Billion, Adobe Estimates
Cyber Monday online sales drop 1.4% from last year to $10.7 billion, falling for the first time ever
The Omicron selloff was the 2nd-biggest day of retail buying of US stocks ever, research firm says
Cyber Monday sales should be robust but business cooling
Cyber Monday poised to be the biggest shopping day of the year, but may still fall short of last year's total
Online sales over holidays on track to top $200 billion after Thanksgiving Day kickoff, Adobe says
Direxion Announces Forward and Reverse Splits of Four ETFs

holdings.infoBox: RETL is an equity ETF with a total of 84 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Retail Bull 3X ETF (RETL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Retail Select Industry index. The fund provides 3x exposure to an equal-weighted index of US retail stocks. RETL was launched on Jul 14, 2010 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Cyber Monday Sales Fall For The First Time Ever—Pulling In $10.7 Billion, Adobe Estimates
data.text: As bottled-up supply chains dent product availability, consumers are increasingly spreading out their record spending this holiday season.

data.title: Cyber Monday online sales drop 1.4% from last year to $10.7 billion, falling for the first time ever
data.text: Consumers logged online on Monday and spent $10.7 billion, marking a 1.4% decrease from year-ago levels, according to data from Adobe Analytics.

data.title: The Omicron selloff was the 2nd-biggest day of retail buying of US stocks ever, research firm says
data.text: Retail investors bought a near-record $2.04 billion in stocks during the November 26 market rout, says Vanda Research.

data.title: Cyber Monday sales should be robust but business cooling
data.text: Consumers are expected to spend between $10.2 billion and $11.3 billion on Monday, making it once again the biggest online shopping day of the year, according to Adobe Digital Economy Index.

data.title: Cyber Monday poised to be the biggest shopping day of the year, but may still fall short of last year's total
data.text: Cyber Monday will likely be the biggest shopping day of the year, however, it could fall short of the final tally in 2020.

data.title: Online sales over holidays on track to top $200 billion after Thanksgiving Day kickoff, Adobe says
data.text: Thanksgiving day online sales totaled $5.1 billion, which matches the level of last year, according to data from Adobe Analytics.

data.title: Digital spending ramps up in major retail's quarterly earnings results
data.text: CNBC's Courtney Reagan joins 'TechCheck' to report on the retail sector's recent digital boom after major retailers reported quarterly earnings.

data.title: Direxion Announces Forward and Reverse Splits of Four ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK, Sept. 24, 2021 /PRNewswire/ -- Direxion has announced it will execute forward share splits for two of its exchange-traded funds ("ETFs"), as well as reverse share splits for an additional tw...
